CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, original VARCHAR, encoded VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (2, 'Virtuoso Database Testing');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (3, '');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (4, 'A');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (5, 'AB');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original) VALUES (6, 'abc');
UPDATE test_strings SET encoded = encode_base64(original);
SELECT id, original, encoded FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id INT, nested_data ANY);
DECLARE n ANY; n := vector('test', [1, 2, 3]);
INSERT INTO nested_test (id, nested_data) VALUES (1, serialize(n));
SELECT id, decode_base64(serialize(nested_data)) AS decoded_data FROM nested_test;
CREATE TABLE multi_join_test (a_id INT, b_id INT, value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO multi_join_test (a_id, b_id, value) VALUES (1, 1, 'Join Test Data');
INSERT INTO multi_join_test (a_id, b_id, value) VALUES (2, 1, 'Another Value');
CREATE TABLE another_test (id INT, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO another_test (id, description) VALUES (1, 'First Description');
SELECT a.value, encode_base64(a.value) AS encoded_value FROM multi_join_test a JOIN another_test b ON a.a_id = b.id WHERE encode_base64(a.value) IS NOT NULL;
DECLARE saved_data VARCHAR; saved_data := encode_base64('Sensitive Data');
SELECT decode_base64(saved_data) AS decoded_data;
